title: Ventura County SFR — Type V-B, per-story area exceeds Table 506.2 allowable
notes: R-3 is UL (unlimited) in 2021 IBC Table 506.2 — dwellings have no IBC area limit; lot coverage is zoning. The prior fail expectation borrowed the R-2 row. Case retained as a true-negative check for the area rule on R-3.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 2207 FOOTHILL RD, VENTURA COUNTY (OJAI area, NOT in VHFHSZ per county GIS)
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
2022 CBC + Ventura County Ord Code Div. VIII
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 1
Building height: 18 ft
Total building area: 8,200 sf
Per-story area: 8,200 sf
Non-sprinklered
Design occupant load: 22
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical service: 200 A
WC 3, LAV 3
EXIT 1 (north), EXIT 2 (south)
NFPA 72 smoke alarms

ground_truth.rationale: Table 506.2 R-3 = UL; no IBC area limit applies to a dwelling
New SFD declared non-sprinklered: CRC R313 mandates sprinklers (consistent with the la- twin case)
